title: angelica acutiloba var. iwatensis
intro: Angelica acutiloba var. iwatensis, also known as Japanese angelica, is a variety of the Angelica acutiloba plant native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Japanese angelica include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Japanese angelica is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
